progressRule: This is the only progress source of truth. Previous artifacts are evidence only and do not override a matrix row without re-verification.
selectionRule: Before work, select the oldest incomplete unblocked dependency in Milestone 1; update the same row and avoid duplicate status artifacts.

rows.blocker: Post-deploy owner browser and production scan are blocked by unavailable owner Chrome connection.
rows.nextExactAction: Reconnect owner browser; run masked paid-license scan and copy/reveal test without recording the key.
rows.rollbackMethod: Feature flag disable and configuration rollback.
acceptanceCriteria: GET metadata never exposes a raw key
authenticated POST reveal/copy returns a usable key or support-safe error
